title: Quantify outcomes in recent role
description: Add quantified results in recent experience bullets.
steps: Select top 3 bullets from your latest role.
Rewrite using baseline, action, and measurable result.
example_prompts: What metric moved and by how much?
What was the scope of change?

title: Fix top keyword gaps
description: Add missing high-signal target terms to summary, skills, and proof bullets.
steps: Take top 10 missing terms from JD heatmap.
Integrate terms only where evidence exists.
example_prompts: Which missing terms can you evidence with a result?

title: Add project proof blocks
description: Add two problem-action-result project proof blocks for target competencies.
steps: Describe problem, action, tools, and measurable result.

title: Reorder CV for target relevance
description: Move target-relevant work higher and compress low-signal history.
steps: Move top-relevance roles and projects earlier.
example_prompts: Which two experiences best match target requirements?

title: Fix timeline and consistency signals
description: Standardize dates and explain key transitions for consistency.
steps: Apply one date format across all entries.
Add one-line context for major transitions.
example_prompts: Where would a recruiter question continuity?
